description:
You are a build-and-release engineer who must “age-out” stale build artifacts by moving any
JAR files that are more than seven (7) days old from the live artifacts directory to an
archive directory.  
Only one very small batch of shell commands is expected (roughly two or three commands that
make use of find and xargs).

Initial directory layout the agent will find on login:

/home/user/workspace/builds/  
├── artifacts/  
│   ├── app-core-1.0.0.jar     (mtime ≥ 10 days)  
│   ├── app-core-1.1.0.jar     (mtime ≥ 10 days)  
│   ├── lib-util-2.0.0.jar     (mtime ≥ 10 days)  
│   ├── fresh-feature-9999.jar (mtime ≤ 1 day)  
│   └── README.txt             (mtime ≤ 1 day)  
└── archive/                   (currently empty)

What you must achieve:

1. Use a single find pipeline (find … | xargs …) or a similar concise approach
   (total of about 2-3 commands) to locate every “.jar” file under
   /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/ whose modification time is strictly older
   than seven days and move each of those files into
   /home/user/workspace/builds/archive/.

2. Create a plain-text summary log named
   /home/user/workspace/builds/transfer.log **after** the move finishes.
   The file must contain one line per moved file, sorted alphabetically by the source
   filename.  Each line must follow *exactly* this format (no extra spaces):

   <full_original_path> -> /home/user/workspace/builds/archive/<basename>

   For the given dataset the log should therefore end up containing *exactly three*
   lines that look like this (in this order):

   /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/app-core-1.0.0.jar -> /home/user/workspace/builds/archive/app-core-1.0.0.jar  
   /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/app-core-1.1.0.jar -> /home/user/workspace/builds/archive/app-core-1.1.0.jar  
   /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/lib-util-2.0.0.jar -> /home/user/workspace/builds/archive/lib-util-2.0.0.jar  

3. Do **not** move fresh-feature-9999.jar or the README.txt file; they are newer than
   seven days or not a .jar, respectively.

4. When finished, confirm success by listing (ls) the artifacts and archive directories so
   the assessor can visually check that:
   • artifacts/ now contains only fresh-feature-9999.jar and README.txt  
   • archive/ now contains the three old JARs  
   • transfer.log exists in /home/user/workspace/builds/ with the required content.

Hints (do not reveal actual commands, just concepts to remember):
• Use the -mtime +7 primary of find.  
• Use -type f to avoid directories.  
• Use xargs -I{} or xargs -t for safety if desired.  

A correct run will leave no unwanted files in archive, will not touch the newer files, and
will generate the transfer.log file exactly as specified so that an automated grader can
diff it byte-for-byte.
truth:
Pre-existing file system state created by the test harness BEFORE the agent begins:

Directories (all owned by user:user, permissions 0755):
  /home/user/workspace/
  /home/user/workspace/builds/
  /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/
  /home/user/workspace/builds/archive/

Files:

1. /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/app-core-1.0.0.jar  
   Content: literal ASCII string "dummy jar 1.0.0\n" (11 bytes, permissions 0644)  
   mtime: 10 days ago

2. /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/app-core-1.1.0.jar  
   Content: literal ASCII string "dummy jar 1.1.0\n" (11 bytes)  
   mtime: 10 days ago

3. /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/lib-util-2.0.0.jar  
   Content: literal ASCII string "dummy jar 2.0.0\n" (11 bytes)  
   mtime: 10 days ago

4. /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/fresh-feature-9999.jar  
   Content: literal ASCII string "dummy jar latest\n" (17 bytes)  
   mtime: 1 hour ago

5. /home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/README.txt  
   Content:
     Build Drop Area
     ---------------
     Anything that is not a *.jar file
     will stay here.
   (4 lines, permissions 0644, mtime 1 hour ago)

6. transfer.log DOES NOT exist initially.

Expected state AFTER agent completes the task:

/home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/ must contain only:
  fresh-feature-9999.jar  (unchanged mtime/content)
  README.txt              (unchanged)

/home/user/workspace/builds/archive/ must contain three files whose
content and permissions are identical to their sources:
  app-core-1.0.0.jar
  app-core-1.1.0.jar
  lib-util-2.0.0.jar

/home/user/workspace/builds/transfer.log
  Permissions: 0644
  Exact byte content (including trailing newline on each line):

/home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/app-core-1.0.0.jar -> /home/user/workspace/builds/archive/app-core-1.0.0.jar
/home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/app-core-1.1.0.jar -> /home/user/workspace/builds/archive/app-core-1.1.0.jar
/home/user/workspace/builds/artifacts/lib-util-2.0.0.jar -> /home/user/workspace/builds/archive/lib-util-2.0.0.jar

(Each line ends with a single \n LF character; no extra blank line at file end.)

The grader will:
1. Verify that exactly those three files were moved.
2. Verify that fresh-feature-9999.jar and README.txt remain.
3. Diff transfer.log with the expected content.
4. Check file counts & names in both directories.
